summary: Implement DetailModel for the detail panel (bottom, 75% width, lower 33%). Supports Empty, Truncated, Expanded, Masked, and Error states with content truncation >200 chars, sensitive content masking via sanitizer, JSON pretty-print for tool_use.input, virtual scroll for expanded content, and golden file tests.
keyDecisions: Used ToolName == '' as empty-entry check instead of Type since EntryToolUse is iota 0
Content truncation uses strict >200 chars threshold (exactly 200 NOT truncated)
Sanitize all content on SetEntry; store both raw and sanitized versions
Masked state persists across expand/collapse toggles when sensitive content detected
JSON pretty-print for tool_use.input using json.MarshalIndent
Field labels in bright cyan (color 51), content in white (color 15)
Exit code only shown in title for entries with non-nil ExitCode (Bash entries)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: internal/model/detail.go implements DetailModel with Init(), Update(msg tea.Msg), View() string
States: Empty, Truncated, Expanded, Masked, Error
Content <=200 chars (including exactly 200): displayed in full
Sensitive values masked with ***, warning banner shown
Panel title format with exit code and line number
Keyboard: Enter toggle, Tab cycle, Esc return
Virtual scroll for expanded large content
Golden file tests for truncated, expanded, and masked rendering

notes: Added detail.empty_hint i18n key to both zh and en locale files.
